basic_details.job_title: MAHATRANSCO Electrician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 26 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MAHATRANSCO) has officially announced the Electrician (Vidyut) Recruitment 2026 with 26 openings. Candidates aged between 18 and 35 years and having completed SSC along with ITI Electrician NCVT certification are eligible to apply. The detailed notification provides complete vacancy details, eligibility criteria, and instructions for online application. Interested candidates can submit their applications online from 4 June 2026 to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and direct apply link are provided below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC Pass, ITI Electrician NCVT Pass
qualification.details: SSC Pass and ITI Electrician NCVT Pass

selection_process: Merit based on SSC and ITI percentage Social reservation
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MAHATRANSCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment is 11th June 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Electrician (Vidyut) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC (10th standard) and possess an ITI certificate in Electrician trade from an NCVT recognized institution to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for all candidates applying for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) posts.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Electrician (Vidyut) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies announced for the Electrician (Vidyut) position in the Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MAHATRANSCO).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit, calculated from your SSC and ITI percentages. Social reservation policies will also be applied during the selection process.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions. Candidates will be hired on a contract basis for the Electrician (Vidyut) posts.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for MAHATRANSCO?
faq.answer: The official website for MAHATRANSCO, where you can find more information and apply, is www.apprenticeshipindia.org.

faq.question: Q10. What is the starting date for the online application?
faq.answer: The online application process for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment begins on 4th June 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the MAHATRANSCO Electrician (Vidyut) recruitment is 11th June 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.
